title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Bewakoof

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Bewakoof
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!
